title: Ten Minutes for Luffy
description: The fighters of Dressrosa protect Luffy until his Haki returns for the final blow.
scene: On pages 1–9, Luffy, King Riku, Viola, Trafalgar Law, Doflamingo move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Luffy's All-Out Attack! His lion blow shakes the city!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: No... ACCOR- DING to King Riku, that must be...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: His face is way scarier than the pic- tune in the newspapers, and he's so round!! Is it really him?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: I heard he was an eight metre tall monster! But he's only about four metres!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Oh, will you all shut up...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Why is he still Boun- Cing?! can't he stop?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Hey, what was that astounding sound?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: What an incredible destructive force! He just can't be alive after that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: At any rate, he did it!!

summary: This part focuses on ten minutes for luffy, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
